case.title: WITHNELL v. WILLIAM R BUSH CONST CO.

opinion.h: WITHNELL v. WILLIAM R BUSH CONST CO., 216 U.S. 603 (1910)
opinion.p: WILLIAM W. WITHNELL, Appellant, v. WILLIAM R. BUSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY et al. No. 108.
Supreme Court of the United States
Messrs. Edmund T. Allen and Clifford B. Allen for appellant.
Mr. E. C. Kehr for respondents.
Decree affirmed with costs by a divided court.
